name: zig-claude-kit
description: Corrective context for Zig that fixes Claude's outdated training data. Auto-detects whether the project targets 0.15.x or 0.16.x and injects the matching reference. Covers Writergate, the 0.16 Io interface, std.fs -> std.Io move, indexOf -> find rename, build.zig, format strings, ArrayList, BoundedArray, usingnamespace, division, tokenize, args, JSON, and for-loop index.
